title: Aranet Rapid Pressure Change Detection
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-6h
| eval p=tonumber(coalesce(pressure_hpa, pressure, ""))
| streamstats window=2 global=f earliest(p) as p_prev by sensor_id
| eval dp=abs(p-p_prev)
| where dp>1.5
| table _time sensor_id location p dp
description: Step changes in pressure accompany doors, windows, or HVAC failures; useful in cleanrooms and pressure-stabilized labs.
value: Speeds diagnosis of envelope breaches and fan failures.
implementation: (1) 1–5 minute ingestion. (2) Tune hPa delta. (3) Suppress known door events via schedule.
grandmaExplanation: We notice sudden air pressure jumps that can mean doors left open or fans failing.
